summary: Vanessa Cruz from a retail company contacted Aegis Cloud Security support regarding a critical SAML certificate rotation issue affecting 60-70% of her workforce on a Sunday. Support engineer Elena Vasquez identified the root cause as a known bug in Aegis Identity version 3.4.1, where the certificate rotation wizard fails to propagate new certificate metadata to all service provider connections. The team worked on a manual workaround requiring Vanessa's engineer Priya to re-import the new certificate metadata across all 14 SP connections. Vanessa expressed broader frustration with platform reliability, citing this bug alongside a recent Detect outage, and Marcus committed to escalating her concerns to customer success.
actionItems: Elena Vasquez: Walk Priya through manually re-importing new certificate metadata for all 14 service provider connections in the admin console
Marcus Williams: Document the call and escalate reliability concerns (Detect outage and SAML wizard bug) to the customer success team for a follow-up conversation with Vanessa
Elena Vasquez: Ensure the customer advisory warning admins not to use the certificate rotation wizard until patch 3.4.2 is distributed today
Aegis Engineering: Release patch 3.4.2 with the certificate rotation wizard fix by the week of April 6th

keyMoments.text: Vanessa reveals that 60-70% of her workforce cannot authenticate into critical business tools on one of the busiest days of the week, characterizing it as a critical operational impact.
keyMoments.speaker: Vanessa Cruz

keyMoments.text: Elena discloses a known bug in the 3.4.1 release where the certificate rotation wizard fails to propagate new certificate metadata to all service provider connections.
keyMoments.speaker: Elena Vasquez

keyMoments.text: Vanessa references the earlier Detect outage combined with this new bug, signaling growing dissatisfaction with overall platform reliability after two and a half years as a customer.
keyMoments.speaker: Vanessa Cruz

keyMoments.text: Elena commits to personally escalating the reliability concerns to the customer success team and documenting the broader issues raised during the call.
keyMoments.speaker: Elena Vasquez
